entries.summary: Complete remediation of AFOMIS Document QA Assistant - 12 phases, 55 tasks, 100% completion. All security vulnerabilities fixed, performance optimized, documentation corrected, and codebase hardened for production.

metadata.plan_id: AFOMIS Document QA Assistant - Remediation Plan

top_rejection_reasons: Missing logger.error() calls in exception handlers
Incorrect HTTP status code expectations in tests
Syntax errors from improper conditional expressions
Plan documentation not matching actual implementation status
lessons_learned: FastAPI Pydantic validators return 422 not 400 - tests must expect correct status codes
Always use UTF-8 encoding when reading/writing files to avoid UnicodeDecodeError on Windows
Verify plan.md matches actual work done - documentation drift is common
Use conditional header building instead of inline conditionals in function calls
Run comprehensive verification scripts after all changes to catch regressions
